section.p: Using the official DITA-OT Docker image ensures consistent, reproducible builds across all environments.

ul.li: Same build environment on every machine

section.p: Add the Docker build to your GitHub Actions or Jenkins pipeline. The container handles all dependencies automatically.
section.pre: - name: Build DITA docs run: | docker run -v $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/docs:/src \ ghcr.io/dita-ot/dita-ot:4.2 \ -i /src/training.ditamap -f html5 -o /src/output
section.p: For Jenkins, use the same Docker run command in a shell step.

ul.li: Pin the image tag to a specific version instead of using "latest"
Mount only the source directory, not the entire workspace
Use a .dockerignore to keep the build context small
